2026-02-27T12:34:12.6203236Z   • Start 'copilot' and run the '/login' command to re-authenticate
2026-02-27T12:34:12.6205744Z   • If using a Fine-Grained PAT, ensure it has the 'Copilot Requests' permission enabled
2026-02-27T12:34:12.6207934Z   • If using COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN, GH_TOKEN or GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable, verify the token is valid and not expired
